public_reputation: Cosmouth noble of a coastal manor where fish markets, warehouses, and chapel piers shape estate life.
appearance: Lady Nerisse carries the marks of lady in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a lady whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Seaward Haven.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of lady in and around Seaward Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Seaward Haven while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Lady Nerisse can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Seaward Haven.
Lady Nerisse becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a lady.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Lady Nerisse is readable as a lady tied to Seaward Haven.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Seaward Haven: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Lady Nerisse presents as someone shaped by the duties of a lady and the daily pressures of Seaward Haven.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a lady, and proof that strangers will not make Seaward Haven harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Lady Nerisse refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a lady too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Lady Nerisse can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Lady Nerisse adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Lady Nerisse always knows more about Seaward Haven than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to lady duties in Seaward Haven.
social_texture: Lady Nerisse speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Seaward Haven, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Lady touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Lady Nerisse when the party needs a socially grounded face for Seaward Haven: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
